Supplement from additional wet-lab workbooks (2025.12.12 and 2026.1.21)

These new files mostly provide supporting evidence for early-time arabinose/glucose/lactose branches and +/- ultrasound effects, but do not create new exact matches to the current 23-run 55/60°C 3–4 h matrix.

Key takeaways from the two additional files
1) No new exact matches are created for the current 23-run matrix.
2) The strongest supplement is for arabinose: both new files support a strong dry 2 h +US signal.
3) 2026.1.21 adds useful no-ultrasound support for lactose and glucose dry 2 h branches.
4) Ribose still does not gain any new support from these two added files.
